2606.25530.title: Evaluating LLMs on Real-World Software Performance Optimization
2606.25530.paper_summary: Software performance optimization is a notoriously complex and manual task. Despite the growing use of Large Language Models (LLMs) for code refinement, we still lack benchmarks that capture how optimization actually happens in real-world codebases. Existing frameworks often oversimplify the problem by focusing on isolated functions or a single performance metric, missing the critical trade-offs between execution time and memory footprint, the inherent noise of the measurement environment, and the variability introduced by different input data and execution conditions. We address this by introducing SWE-Pro, a repository-level benchmark derived from 102 expert-written optimizations from open-source projects. Unlike previous benchmarks, SWE-Pro pairs each task with parameterized tests to evaluate runtime, peak memory, and Time-Weighted Memory Usage (TWMU) across varying input data and execution conditions under noise-aware measurement conditions. Our evaluation shows that current LLMs struggle significantly: runtime gains are negligible, and memory optimizations are nearly non-existent. This stands in sharp contrast to expert implementations, which achieve an aggregate speedup of 15.5x and peak memory reduction of 171.3x over benchmark tasks. Expert-written improvements are observed in 91.2% of tasks for runtime and 65.7% for peak memory. Our findings expose a substantial gap between current LLM capabilities and the demands of expert-level engineering.
2606.25530.paper_summary_zh: 軟體性能優化是一項眾所皆知的複雜且手動的任務。儘管大型語言模型（LLMs）在代碼精煉中的使用日益增長，但我們仍然缺乏能夠捕捉實際代碼庫中優化過程的基準測試。現有的框架通常通過專注於孤立的函數或單一性能指標來過度簡化問題，忽略了執行時間與內存佔用之間的關鍵權衡、測量環境的固有噪聲以及不同輸入數據和執行條件所引入的變異性。我們通過引入SWE-Pro來解決這一問題，這是一個基於102個專家編寫的開源項目優化的庫級基準測試。與之前的基準測試不同，SWE-Pro將每個任務與參數化測試配對，以在噪聲感知測量條件下評估不同輸入數據和執行條件下的運行時間、峰值內存和時間加權內存使用（TWMU）。我們的評估顯示，當前的LLMs面臨顯著挑戰：運行時間的增益微不足道，而內存優化幾乎不存在。這與專家實現形成了鮮明對比，專家實現在基準任務上達到了15.5倍的總體加速和171.3倍的峰值內存減少。專家編寫的改進在91.2%的任務中觀察到運行時間的提升，65.7%的任務中觀察到峰值內存的提升。我們的研究結果揭示了當前LLM能力與專家級工程需求之間的巨大差距。
2606.25530.author: Ezgi Sarıkayak et.al.
2606.25530.authors: Ezgi Sarıkayak, Wenchao Gu, Hesham Ghonim, Chunyang Chen
